matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 8 > Niagara Falls Day Trip

node.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 8 > Elements on the Falls

node.name: Elements on the Falls
node.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Canoe Restaurant

node.name: Canoe Restaurant
node.description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > YYZ Departure

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.
